title: Elif DİNÇERLER, Ph.D

Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

Asst. Prof. Dr. Elif Dinçerler was born in Ankara in 1982. She graduated from Hacettepe University Nutrition and Dietetics Department in 2004. In 2006, she completed the master's degree program of Beykent University on Hospital and Health Institutions Management. In 2016, she received Ph.D title by completing the Ph.D program of Başkent University on Nutrition and Dietetics.

She worked as a dietician at Memorial Suadiye Outpatient Clinic between 2004-2007, and at Maltepe Medical Center until 2016.
